Stale grooming handoff

Beat was groomed because it was stale.
Decision: drop
Rationale: The feature is already shipped. Optimistic release updates are fully implemented via release-pending-store.ts (Zustand store), beat-release-optimism.ts (optimism logic with markPendingRelease/applyPendingBeatReleases), and useDisplayedBeats in page.tsx. The overview repaints immediately on Release click and reconciles with server truth — exactly what this beat specifies.
